input.description: Find and read the spark-pi job YAML

input.command: kubectl get job spark-pi -n spark-pi -o yaml 2>&1 | head -60

content.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"batch/v1","kind":"Job","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-pi","namespace":"spark-pi"},"spec":{"backoffLimit":0,"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"spark-pi","component":"driver"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-c","echo \"==============================================\"\necho \"  SparkPi Job\"\necho \"==============================================\"\nexport SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)\n/opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\\n  --master local[2] \\\n  --driver-memory 512m \\\n  --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \\\n  /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \\\n  1000\nEXIT_CODE=$?\necho \"SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE\"\nexit $EXIT_CODE\n"],"image":"apache/spark:3.5.3","name":"spark-submit","resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"500m","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"200m","memory":"512Mi"}}}],"restartPolicy":"Never","serviceAccountName":"spark-pi"}}}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-06-25T17:12:04Z"
  generation: 1
  labels:
    app: spark-pi
    batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 99483e13-8312-4ec5-b0c1-16e01ea4ad3b
    batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-pi
    component: driver
    controller-uid: 99483e13-8312-4ec5-b0c1-16e01ea4ad3b
    job-name: spark-pi
  name: spark-pi
  namespace: spark-pi
  resourceVersion: "1172337"
  uid: 99483e13-8312-4ec5-b0c1-16e01ea4ad3b
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  completionMode: NonIndexed
  completions: 1
  manualSelector: false
  parallelism: 1
  podReplacementPolicy: TerminatingOrFailed
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 99483e13-8312-4ec5-b0c1-16e01ea4ad3b
  suspend: false
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: spark-pi
        batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 99483e13-8312-4ec5-b0c1-16e01ea4ad3b
        batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-pi
        component: driver
        controller-uid: 99483e13-8312-4ec5-b0c1-16e01ea4ad3b
        job-name: spark-pi
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          echo "=============================================="
          echo "  SparkPi Job"
          echo "=============================================="
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --driver-memory 512m \
            --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
            /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \
            1000
          EXIT_CODE=$?
          echo "SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE"
          exit $EXIT_CODE
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3

content.thinking:
The current job already has the correct image `apache/spark:3.5.3`, correct service account `spark-pi`, and correct memory format `512Mi`. The RBAC role also already has `pods` in resources. It seems like the issues have already been fixed in the live cluster, or the job YAML was already applied with correct settings.

The job is currently running. Let me wait for it to complete and check the logs.

content.text: The job appears to already have the correct configuration applied (correct image, service account, memory format, and RBAC). Let me wait for it to complete and monitor its progress.

input.command: kubectl wait job/spark-pi -n spark-pi --for=condition=Complete --timeout=300s 2>&1 || kubectl wait job/spark-pi -n spark-pi --for=condition=Failed --timeout=10s 2>&1
